popularStory.headline: Raymond VI, Count of Toulouse (Wikipedia)
popularStory.description:
Raymond VI, Count of Toulouse

Raymond VI (Occitan: Ramon; October 27, 1156 – August 2, 1222) was Count of Toulouse and Marquis of Provence from 1194 to 1222. He was also Count of Melgueil (as Raymond …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond VI de Toulouse於1156年10月27日出生在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯時，他的父親Raymond V Comte de Toulouse32歲，母親Constance de France33歲。他於1196年10月與Joan of England Queen of Sicily在法國阿希迪瑟 德 盧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1222年8月2日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond VI de Toulouse于1156年10月27日出生在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯时，他的父亲Raymond V Comte de Toulouse32岁，母亲Constance de France33岁。他于1196年10月与Joan of England Queen of Sicily在法国阿希迪瑟 德 盧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1222年8月2日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toulouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Camile, Emile, Gilles, Marcel, Rosaire.

French and English: habitational name from Toulouse, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, most notably the city in Haute-Garonne, the capital of this French department and of the region of Occitanie.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond VI de Toulouse was born on 27 October 1156, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, his father, Raymond V Comte de Toulouse, was 32 and his mother, Constance de France, was 33. He married Joan of England Queen of Sicily in October 1196, in Archdiocese of Rouen, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 August 1222, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond VI de Toulouse est né le 27 octobre 1156, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, son père, Raymond V Comte de Toulouse, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Constance de France, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan of England Queen of Sicily en octobre 1196, à Archidiocèse de Rouen, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 août 1222, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond VI de Toulouse am 27. Oktober 1156 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raymond V Comte de Toulouse 32 und seine Mutter Constance de France 33. Er hat im Oktober 1196 in Archidiocèse de Rouen, Frankreich Joan of England Queen of Sicily geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. August 1222 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond VI de Toulouse è nato il il 27 ottobre 1156 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Raymond V Comte de Toulouse, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Constance de France, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan of England Queen of Sicily nel ottobre 1196, nel Archidiocèse de Rouen, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 agosto 1222, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymond VI de Toulouseが1156年10月27日にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Raymond V Comte de Toulouseは32歳，母Constance de Franceは33歳であった。1196年10月にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド ロウンでJoan of England Queen of Sicilyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1222年8月2日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond VI de Toulouse(이)가 1156년 10월 27일 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raymond V Comte de Toulouse(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de France(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1196년 10월 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 루언에서 Joan of England Queen of Sicily(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1222년 8월 2일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Fontevraud-L'Abbaye,49140,Maine-et-Loire: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond VI de Toulouse nasceu em 27 de outubro de 1156, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Raymond V Comte de Toulouse, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Constance de France, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan of England Queen of Sicily em outubro de 1196, em Archidiocèse de Rouen, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1222, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Fontevraud-L'Abbaye,49140,Maine-et-Loire: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond VI de Toulouse родился 27 октября 1156 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Raymond V Comte de Toulouse было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Constance de France, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan of England Queen of Sicily октябрь 1196 г. в местности арчидиокeс де роуен, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 августа 1222 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond VI de Toulouse nació el 27 de octubre de 1156, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Raymond V Comte de Toulouse, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Constance de France, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan of England Queen of Sicily en octubre de 1196, en Archidiocèse de Rouen, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1222, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
